scheme: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana (MJPJAY) - Category B
benefit: Free cashless surgery up to Rs. 5 lakhs per year at empanelled hospitals

scheme: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana (MJPJAY) - Category A
benefit: Free cashless cancer treatment up to Rs. 5 lakhs per year

scheme: Ayushman Bharat PMJAY + MJPJAY - Category A
benefit: Free dialysis treatment up to Rs. 5 lakhs per year, portable across India

scheme: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana (MJPJAY) - Category D (Road Accident)
benefit: Free treatment up to Rs. 1 lakh for road accident victims even from outside Maharashtra
documents: Aadhaar Card or Voter ID or PAN Card

benefit: Cash assistance Rs. 700 (rural) or Rs. 600 (urban) for institutional delivery + transport assistance
documents: BPL Card/Ration Card, Aadhaar Card, MCH Card

benefit: Cash assistance for institutional delivery, free delivery at government hospital

scheme: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY) + Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram (JSSK)
benefit: Free delivery, free medicines, free food during hospital stay, cash assistance

problem: child has birth defect, cleft lip
benefit: Free screening, surgery and treatment for cleft lip at District Early Intervention Centre (DEIC)
documents: Aadhaar Card of child/parent, Birth Certificate

benefit: Free hearing screening, treatment and hearing aids through DEIC
documents: Aadhaar Card, School ID if enrolled

scheme: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram (RBSK) + PM POSHAN
benefit: Free nutritional screening and treatment, referral to NRC (Nutrition Rehabilitation Centre)

scheme: NPCDCS (National Programme for Prevention and Control of Cancer, Diabetes, CVD and Stroke)
benefit: Free screening, free medicines and free treatment at NCD Clinic in District Hospital
Free emergency cardiac care at CCU, free treatment up to Rs. 5 lakhs
documents: Ayushman Card, BPL Card, Aadhaar Card

scheme: NPCDCS + Rastriya Arogya Nidhi (Cancer Fund) + MJPJAY
benefit: Free cancer screening at Day Care Centre, financial assistance for treatment, up to Rs. 5 lakhs coverage

scheme: Nikshay Poshan Yojana + DOTS (Free TB Treatment)
benefit: Free TB medicines + Rs. 500 per month nutritional support directly in bank account

scheme: Ayushman Arogya Mandir (Health and Wellness Centre)
benefit: Free OPD consultation, free basic medicines at nearest Health and Wellness Centre

problem: need surgery but no card no money
scheme: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana (MJPJAY) - Category B
benefit: Free surgery up to Rs. 5 lakhs with white ration card or domicile certificate
documents: White Ration Card OR Domicile Certificate, Aadhaar Card, Self Declaration

scheme: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY) + JSY
benefit: Rs. 5000 cash assistance in 3 instalments for first pregnancy + JSY delivery benefit
documents: Aadhaar Card, Bank Account, MCP Card
